result.reason: The current URL construction logic in HTTPBase.cs can result in double port numbers if a port is embedded in the hostname field and also specified in the port field.
result.approach: Refactor the GetUrl() method in HTTPBase.cs to use UriBuilder for robust URL construction, correctly handling embedded ports in the hostname and prioritizing explicit port field values while avoiding double-port issues.
